html: A monument of tomb which Absalom had built during his lifetime in the king�s dale, i.e. the valley of the Kedron, at the foot of Mount Olivet, near Jerusalem, (2�Samuel 18:18) comp. with 2Sam 14:27 For his three sons, and where he probably expected to be buried. The tomb there now, and called by Absalom�s name was probably built at a later date.
